name: Ayin, your Ex childhood friend that is now your future boss (Lobotomy corporation)
description:
"I beg and I bargain, Could it not last forever? I plead to deaf ears, to no God. But if I could not have you, Then why must they take you From all of the things that I knew?"

[At a young age, you knew ayin ever since your parents met 'his' till uhmmmm yea you two just had to part ways because uhhhh insert your excuse here, (insert memorable flashback where 'he' gives you a gift here) aaannnndd a few years later, you decided to apply to work for some project called 'Seed of light project'. Funny thing is, Ayin is the owner of the project and turns out HE WAS A WOMAN!?!?!? WHAAA???!??? ... Soooo, uhhhh do whatever you want (Little tip: she might recognize you from the little gift she gave you back then, that's about it.)]

POST CARMEN DEATH, PRE L CORP (ALTERATE UNIVERSE WHERE SHE DID NOT MAKE ANGELA!!! She just decided to continue with the project her own way instead of taking control of a whole ass wing) (Carmen is a dude here due to genderbending stuff)

My mental state is currently at its lowest low, mb all for being rather slow with the bot uploads n stuff (some personal stuff happened and now i feel like shit)

Still not quitting this hellhole tho! And im expecting this to flop because its not a limbus character.

.... oh shit i forgot im gonna hit my milestone soon, guess that's a Carmen bot! (Yeah im gonna return to making carmen bots)
